seems to indicates that the infra response time was relatively slow..

Patch Set 1: Code-Review+1

There were some errors from Cloudify Manager during the bootstrap, similar to what we've seen before in the gating environment (but so far, nowhere else).  Not related to enabling password generation.
Change has been successfully merged by Morgan Richomme
